revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「'''高田神社'''（たかたじんじゃ、たかだじんじゃ） * [[高田神社 (稲敷市)]]（たかだじんじゃ） - [[茨城県]][[稲敷市]] * [[髙田神社 (白山市)]]（たかだじんじゃ） - [[石川県]][[白山市]] * [[高田神社 (飛騨市)]]（たかたじんじゃ） - [[岐阜県]][[飛騨市]] * [[高田神社 (隠岐の島町)]]（たかたじんじゃ） - [[島根県]][[隠岐郡]][[隠岐の島町]] * 高田…」
revision.text:
'''高田神社'''（たかたじんじゃ、たかだじんじゃ）
* [[高田神社 (稲敷市)]]（たかだじんじゃ） - [[茨城県]][[稲敷市]] * [[髙田神社 (白山市)]]（たかだじんじゃ） - [[石川県]][[白山市]] * [[高田神社 (飛騨市)]]（たかたじんじゃ） - [[岐阜県]][[飛騨市]] * [[高田神社 (隠岐の島町)]]（たかたじんじゃ） - [[島根県]][[隠岐郡]][[隠岐の島町]] * [[高田神社 (真庭市)]]（たかだじんじゃ） - [[岡山県]][[真庭市]] * [[高田神社 (津山市)]]（たかたじんじゃ） - 岡山県[[津山市]] * [[高田神社 (松山市)]]（たかたじんじゃ） - [[愛媛県]][[松山市]] * [[高田神社 (糸島市)]]（たかたじんじゃ） - [[福岡県]][[糸島市]]
{{aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:たかたしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.text:
'''Takata Shrine''' (高田神社) refers to several Shinto shrines in Japan:
* {{ill|Takata Shrine (Inashiki)|ja|高田神社 (稲敷市)}} (たかだじんじゃ) - Located in Inashiki City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Takada Shrine (Hakusan)|ja|髙田神社 (白山市)}} (たかだじんじゃ) - Located in Hakusan City, Ishikawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Takata Shrine (Hida)|ja|高田神社 (飛騨市)}} (たかたじんじゃ) - Located in Hida City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Takata Shrine (Oki Island)|ja|高田神社 (隠岐の島町)}} (たかたじんじゃ) - Located in Okinoshima Town, Oki District, Shimane Prefecture. * {{ill|Takada Shrine (Maniwa)|ja|高田神社 (真庭市)}} (たかだじんじゃ) - Located in Maniwa City, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Takata Shrine (Tsuyama)|ja|高田神社 (津山市)}} (たかたじんじゃ) - Located in Tsuyama City, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Takata Shrine (Matsuyama)|ja|高田神社 (松山市)}} (たかたじんじゃ) - Located in Matsuyama City, Ehime Prefecture. * {{ill|Takata Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|高田神社 (糸島市)}} (たかたじんじゃ) - Located in Itoshima City, Fukuoka Prefecture.
{{disambiguation}} [[Category:Shrines with the same name]] [[ja:高田神社]]

* {{ill|Takata Shrine (Inashiki)|ja|高田神社 (稲敷市)}} (たかだじんじゃ) - Located in Inashiki City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Takada Shrine (Hakusan)|ja|髙田神社 (白山市)}} (たかだじんじゃ) - Located in Hakusan City, Ishikawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Takata Shrine (Hida)|ja|高田神社 (飛騨市)}} (たかたじんじゃ) - Located in Hida City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Takata Shrine (Oki Island)|ja|高田神社 (隠岐の島町)}} (たかたじんじゃ) - Located in Okinoshima Town, Oki District, Shimane Prefecture. * {{ill|Takada Shrine (Maniwa)|ja|高田神社 (真庭市)}} (たかだじんじゃ) - Located in Maniwa City, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Takata Shrine (Tsuyama)|ja|高田神社 (津山市)}} (たかたじんじゃ) - Located in Tsuyama City, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Takata Shrine (Matsuyama)|ja|高田神社 (松山市)}} (たかたじんじゃ) - Located in Matsuyama City, Ehime Prefecture. * {{ill|Takata Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|高田神社 (糸島市)}} (たかたじんじゃ) - Located in Itoshima City, Fukuoka Prefecture.

* {{ill|Takata Shrine (Inashiki)|ja|高田神社 (稲敷市)}} (たかだじんじゃ) - Located in Inashiki City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Takada Shrine (Hakusan)|ja|髙田神社 (白山市)}} (たかだじんじゃ) - Located in Hakusan City, Ishikawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Takata Shrine (Hida)|ja|高田神社 (飛騨市)}} (たかたじんじゃ) - Located in Hida City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Takata Shrine (Oki Island)|ja|高田神社 (隠岐の島町)}} (たかたじんじゃ) - Located in Okinoshima Town, Oki District, Shimane Prefecture. * {{ill|Takada Shrine (Maniwa)|ja|高田神社 (真庭市)}} (たかだじんじゃ) - Located in Maniwa City, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Takata Shrine (Tsuyama)|ja|高田神社 (津山市)}} (たかたじんじゃ) - Located in Tsuyama City, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Takata Shrine (Matsuyama)|ja|高田神社 (松山市)}} (たかたじんじゃ) - Located in Matsuyama City, Ehime Prefecture. * {{ill|Takata Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|高田神社 (糸島市)}} (たかたじんじゃ) - Located in Itoshima City, Fukuoka Prefecture.
